---
name: Enhancement request
about: Propose a feature or improvement with implementation-ready detail
title: "[enhancement] "
labels: ["enhancement", "triage"]
assignees: []
---

## User problem
What user or business outcome is not met today.

## Proposed change
Describe expected behavior and boundaries.

## In scope / out of scope
- In scope:
- Out of scope:

## Cross-service impact
- [ ] portal-web
- [ ] api-gateway
- [ ] orders-service
- [ ] inventory-service
- [ ] notifications-service
- [ ] shared-contracts
- [ ] platform-infra

## Acceptance criteria
- [ ] Clear testable behavior
- [ ] Unit or service-level automated tests identified and required
- [ ] End-to-end validation path identified and required
- [ ] Quality gates identified (CI/security/e2e/load if needed)
- [ ] Rollout + rollback plan

## Evidence needed at PR time
- [ ] Linked issue(s)
- [ ] Unit test evidence
- [ ] End-to-end validation evidence
- [ ] Validation links
- [ ] Risk assessment
